footer.tagline: Expert itineraries, hidden gems, and deals for every kind of traveler.
footer.affiliateDisclosureText: TravelPlanInfo participates in affiliate programs including CJ Affiliate and Travelpayouts. When you click links to Hotels.com, Vrbo, CruiseDirect, Aviasales, or other partner sites and make a purchase, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. This helps us keep the site free and our recommendations honest.

planner.title: Trip Planner
planner.heading: Plan your perfect trip
planner.subheading: Answer a few questions and we'll help you build an itinerary that fits your budget and interests.
planner.smartSearchDesc: We compare prices across 100+ booking sites
planner.bestDealsDesc: Contextual affiliate deals matched to your trip

tripForm.surpriseMeDesc: Atlas will suggest destinations based on your budget and interests.
tripForm.surpriseMeButton: ✨ I don't know yet — Surprise Me
tripForm.atlasFindCheapestDates: ✨ Let Atlas find the cheapest dates for me
tripForm.atlasDecidesTooltip: Atlas will search across all dates to find the best price for your trip. You won't need to pick dates — just set your budget and preferences.
tripForm.flexibleDates: I'm flexible if it means a great deal
tripForm.flexibleDatesDesc: Atlas will search for the cheapest dates to fly
tripForm.vibeLabel: What vibe are you looking for?
tripForm.destinationHintPlaceholder: Anywhere specific? (country, region, or leave blank)
tripForm.pickAtLeast2: Pick at least 2 interests for Surprise Me
tripForm.customInterestExample: e.g., scuba diving, wine tasting, street art
tripForm.atlasWillRefine: Atlas will chat with you after planning to refine your itinerary with personalized suggestions.
tripForm.whatVibes: What vibes are you looking for?
tripForm.chooserTitle: How would you like to plan?
tripForm.chooserSubtitle: Choose the option that best fits your situation.
tripForm.pathATitle: I Know When & Where I'm Going
tripForm.pathADesc: I have a destination and dates in mind. Help me find the best flights and deals.
tripForm.pathBTitle: Atlas, Help Me Out & Surprise Me!
tripForm.pathBDesc: I'm flexible — let Atlas discover the perfect trip based on my interests and budget.
tripForm.packageDealsDesc: Curated deals from our affiliate partners. Prices may vary.
tripForm.customVibesPlaceholder: e.g., road trip, rooftop bars, island hopping
tripForm.failedToCreateTrip: Failed to create trip. Please try again.

preferences.title: My Travel Profile
preferences.customBudgetRangesDesc: Atlas uses these thresholds to label prices as Budget, Mid-range, or Luxury.

destinations.title: Popular Destinations
destinations.heading: Where do you want to go?
destinations.subheading: Find the best flights and hotels to top destinations. We compare prices across major booking sites to get you the best deal.
destinations.tryDifferentSearch: Try a different search or browse all destinations below.
destinations.dontSeeDesc: We search hundreds of airlines and hotel booking sites to find you the best prices anywhere in the world.

guides.title: Travel Guides
guides.heading: Explore our travel guides
guides.subheading: Expert advice, itineraries, and tips for planning your next adventure.
guides.newsletterTitle: Get travel tips in your inbox
guides.newsletterSubtitle: Get weekly deals, itinerary tips, and destination guides.

hotDeals.tagline: Live Deal Feed · Hotels · Vacation Rentals · Car Rentals · Cruises
hotDeals.heading: Curated travel deals from trusted partners — book & save.
hotDeals.subheading: Compare hotels on Hotels.com, vacation rentals on Vrbo, car rentals on EconomyBookings, and cruise deals on CruiseDirect. Every booking supports TravelPlanInfo.
hotDeals.dealAlertsDesc: Weekly flight + hotel bundles with price-drop alerts.
hotDeals.affiliateDisclosure: TravelPlanInfo earns a commission when you book through our partner links. This helps us keep the site free. Prices shown are estimates and may vary.

assistant.bubbleItineraryInterests: Tap the mic and tell me what you're into — it's faster!
